response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software engineering experience and strong technical skills in full-stack development, cloud infrastructure, and AI-agent tooling, including MCP servers. However, his resume lacks explicit mention of GenAI-specific projects, RAG architectures, vector databases, or multi-agent systems, which are core requirements. His AI-related work appears limited to MCP and developer tooling, and his cloud platform experience is not clearly detailed beyond AWS CDK usage.
strengths: 10+ years of full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-native development (AWS CDK)
Demonstrated expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP servers, code generators)
Strong technical leadership and mentoring background, including organizing workshops and contributing to open-source projects
concerns: No clear evidence of GenAI production experience, RAG architectures, or vector databases in resume
Lacks explicit mention of major cloud platform expertise (AWS/GCP/Azure) beyond AWS CDK in pricing automation
Limited visibility of multi-agent system framework experience (LangGraph, CrewAI, etc.) despite recent MCP tooling work
